shots.title: Dashboard server + data API
shots.notes: Exported 6 chart renderers, 3 SVG helpers, REPORT_CSS, and escapeHtml from report.ts. Created packages/core/src/dashboard.ts (~500 lines) with generateDashboardHtml, renderSprintDetail, renderSprintTimeline, generateDashboardScript, computeMissHeatmap, renderMissHeatmap, computeAreaHazards, renderAreaHazardOverlay. CLI dashboard command with http.createServer (4 routes), browser auto-open, SIGINT handler. 53 new tests (41 core + 12 CLI).

shots.title: Sprint timeline + interactive drill-down
shots.notes: renderSprintTimeline SVG bar chart (gray par, colored actual). generateDashboardScript with click handlers, fetch /api/sprint/:n?html=1, toggle logic, scrollIntoView. data-sprint attributes on table rows and timeline bars. Bulk of implementation batched with S19-1; follow-up commit added data-sprint to renderSprintTable <tr> rows.

shots.title: Miss pattern heatmap + area hazard overlay
shots.notes: computeMissHeatmap extracts per-sprint miss counts from stats.miss_directions, normalizes intensity 0-1. renderMissHeatmap: SVG grid with color interpolation #f8fafc to #ef4444, title tooltips. computeAreaHazards: per-club hazard frequency from shot records. renderAreaHazardOverlay: compact table below area performance. All integrated into generateDashboardHtml.

shots.title: Configuration + docs
shots.notes: Added dashboard config to SlopeConfig (port, autoOpen, refreshInterval). resolveDashboardConfig merge chain: CLI flags > config file > defaults. Created docs/guides/dashboard.md usage guide. Updated backlog README with S19 entry. Added dashboard examples to CLI help text.

conditions.description: New infrastructure pattern — HTTP server in CLI, first live-serving feature. Composed existing renderers rather than duplicating.

nutrition.description: Clean build + all 955 tests pass (721 core + 36 store + 144 CLI + 54 MCP) after each commit
3 focused commits following execution order. Build + typecheck + targeted test run before each commit.

Composed existing chart renderers from report.ts — zero duplication. Dashboard wraps same functions in new layout with nav, drill-down, heatmap. Config merge chain mirrors existing resolveEscalationConfig pattern.
All existing 901 tests continue to pass. 54 new tests added (42 core, 12 CLI). Zero regressions — generateHtmlReport unchanged.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Efficient. S19-2 and S19-3 features were naturally batched into S19-1 since dashboard.ts was created from scratch — splitting them into separate files would have been artificial. The export-only refactor of report.ts was clean: add 'export' keyword, rename CSS to REPORT_CSS, zero behavior changes.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: Dashboard composes, doesn't duplicate. All chart logic lives in report.ts (renderers) and dashboard.ts (new charts + layout). CLI server is thin: routes -> load data -> call renderers -> respond. The /api/sprint/:n?html=1 pattern lets the inline script fetch pre-rendered HTML for drill-down without client-side rendering. Port 0 in tests for random port allocation.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: How well the existing renderer separation worked — each chart function is pure (data in, HTML string out), so composing them into a different layout was trivial. The miss heatmap was simpler than expected since stats.miss_directions already has the data shaped correctly.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: The dashboard is a natural home for future visualizations. Could add WebSocket for real-time updates during sprint execution, or server-sent events for session activity. The /api/data endpoint enables future external integrations.

yardage_book_updates: packages/core/src/report.ts: Exported 6 renderers, 3 SVG helpers, REPORT_CSS, escapeHtml. Added data-sprint to table <tr> rows.
packages/core/src/dashboard.ts: New file — dashboard HTML generator, sprint detail, sprint timeline, miss heatmap, area hazard overlay, interactive drill-down script
packages/cli/src/commands/dashboard.ts: New file — HTTP server (/, /api/data, /api/sprint/:n), browser auto-open, resolveDashboardConfig
packages/core/src/config.ts: dashboard config (port, autoOpen, refreshInterval) added to SlopeConfig
packages/core/src/index.ts: Exports for dashboard functions/types + report renderers/helpers
docs/guides/dashboard.md: New file — usage guide with CLI flags, config, API routes, architecture
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — zero hazards, zero regressions
Compose-not-duplicate: dashboard.ts calls report.ts renderers, never copies their implementation
Node built-in http module only — zero new dependencies in package.json
54 new tests with full HTTP integration testing (port 0, fetch, content-type assertions)
